summary: Iteration 31: Bulk Upload & Search Testing - Backend 100% PASS (15/15), Frontend 100% PASS. All bulk import features working correctly. Search API returns 224 providers with high limit, UI shows 50 (default).

issues: Shows only 50 results by default - this is API default limit, not a bug but may confuse users expecting 200+ results

backend_api_tests: Providers have required fields (provider_id, business_name, comuna, approved)
frontend_ui_tests: Home page loads with 3 service categories (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental)
Provider cards display with images, names, locations, ratings
Bulk upload interface shows: Carga Masiva desde Excel
Provider detail page loads with full info
Provider detail shows: name, location, rating, services, pricing, gallery
Google Maps intentionally disabled - shows 'Mapa no disponible'

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend search page doesn't request higher limit - shows only 50 of 224 providers. Consider pagination or infinite scroll for better UX.

mocked_apis.google_maps: Intentionally disabled - shows 'Mapa no disponible' message

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 - Bulk Upload & Search testing completed. Key findings: 1) Backend API /api/providers returns 224 approved providers with limit=500, default is 50. 2) Bulk upload endpoint POST /api/admin/residencias/upload-excel works with CSV/XLSX, auto-generates emails and passwords. 3) Admin panel shows 257 residencias total, 200 in Residencias tab. 4) Frontend search shows 50 results by default (API limit). 5) Provider detail pages work for imported providers. 6) All 3 service categories (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental) are filterable. 7) Google Maps is intentionally disabled. Key data-testids: search-page, admin-panel, tab-crear-residencia, excel-upload-input, download-template-btn, new-residencia-btn, provider-card.
